Localization.Description: A malicious object is found in an email and cured

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A malicious object is found and deleted from an email on host {event_src.host}
A malicious object is found in an email. The email is rejected on host {event_src.host}.
A malicious object is found in an email. The email is deleted on host {event_src.host}.
A malicious object is found in an email and quarantined on host {event_src.host}
